description: Supply chain verification policy for Aevum-Printer. Controls what provenance, signatures, and attestations are required before a bundle is accepted and applied.

rekor.note: In install/maintenance modes offline Sigstore bundles are accepted. In locked mode, a Rekor log entry or offline bundle is required.

allowed_signing_identities.comment: Primary release identity - replace with actual OIDC subject on first real release
allowed_signing_identities.subject: REPLACE_WITH_RELEASE_OIDC_SUBJECT

sigstore.note: Set keyless_allowed true only after OIDC identity is confirmed. Key-based signing also accepted via allowed_key_fingerprints.

in_toto.note: All required_steps must have a corresponding .link attestation in the bundle. Functionary public keys loaded from in-toto/keys/.

slsa.note: SLSA L1 is the current floor. Advance to L3 when hermetic builds and TPM builder attestation are complete.
